query:
INSERT INTO immigration_cards (countryCode, countryName, countryNameLocal, cardUrl, cardName, description, requiredFields, fieldLabels, isActive) VALUES
('TH', 'Thailand', 'ประเทศไทย', 'https://tdac.immigration.go.th', 'Thailand Digital Arrival Card (TDAC)', '태국 입국 72시간 전 작성 권장. 2024년부터 전자 입국카드로 전환됨.', '["passport_number","full_name","surname","given_name","nationality","date_of_birth","gender","passport_expiry","flight_number","hotel_name","hotel_address","purpose_of_visit","length_of_stay"]', '{"passport_number":"여권번호 (Passport No.)","full_name":"성명 (Full Name)","surname":"성 (Surname/Family Name)","given_name":"이름 (Given Name)","nationality":"국적 (Nationality)","date_of_birth":"생년월일 (Date of Birth)","gender":"성별 (Gender)","passport_expiry":"여권만료일 (Passport Expiry)","flight_number":"항공편명 (Flight No.)","hotel_name":"호텔명 (Hotel Name)","hotel_address":"호텔주소 (Hotel Address)","purpose_of_visit":"방문목적 (Purpose of Visit)","length_of_stay":"체류기간 (Length of Stay)"}', true),
('JP', 'Japan', '日本', 'https://www.vjw.digital.go.jp', 'Visit Japan Web', '일본 입국 전 Visit Japan Web에서 입국심사, 세관신고, 면세 QR코드를 미리 등록할 수 있습니다.', '["passport_number","full_name","surname","given_name","nationality","date_of_birth","gender","passport_expiry","flight_number","hotel_address","purpose_of_visit","length_of_stay","phone"]', '{"passport_number":"여권번호 (パスポート番号)","full_name":"성명","surname":"성 (姓)","given_name":"이름 (名)","nationality":"국적","date_of_birth":"생년월일","gender":"성별","passport_expiry":"여권만료일","flight_number":"항공편명 (便名)","hotel_address":"숙박지 주소","purpose_of_visit":"방문목적","length_of_stay":"체류기간","phone":"연락처"}', true),
('IN', 'India', 'भारत', 'https://indianvisaonline.gov.in/evisa/tvoa.html', 'India e-Visa / Arrival Card', '인도 입국 시 e-Visa 또는 도착 비자 신청이 필요합니다. 전자 입국카드는 기내에서 배포됩니다.', '["passport_number","full_name","surname","given_name","nationality","date_of_birth","gender","passport_expiry","passport_issue_date","issuing_country","flight_number","hotel_address","phone","email","purpose_of_visit"]', '{"passport_number":"여권번호","full_name":"성명","surname":"성","given_name":"이름","nationality":"국적","date_of_birth":"생년월일","gender":"성별","passport_expiry":"여권만료일","passport_issue_date":"여권발급일","issuing_country":"발급국가","flight_number":"항공편명","hotel_address":"숙박지 주소","phone":"연락처","email":"이메일","purpose_of_visit":"방문목적"}', true),
('VN', 'Vietnam', 'Việt Nam', 'https://evisa.xuatnhapcanh.gov.vn', 'Vietnam e-Visa / Arrival Card', '베트남 전자비자(e-Visa) 신청 또는 도착 시 입국카드 작성이 필요합니다.', '["passport_number","full_name","surname","given_name","nationality","date_of_birth","gender","passport_expiry","flight_number","hotel_address","purpose_of_visit","phone","email"]', '{"passport_number":"여권번호","full_name":"성명","surname":"성","given_name":"이름","nationality":"국적","date_of_birth":"생년월일","gender":"성별","passport_expiry":"여권만료일","flight_number":"항공편명","hotel_address":"숙박지 주소","purpose_of_visit":"방문목적","phone":"연락처","email":"이메일"}', true),
('PH', 'Philippines', 'Pilipinas', 'https://etravel.gov.ph', 'Philippines eTravel', '필리핀 입국 72시간 전 eTravel 등록이 필수입니다.', '["passport_number","full_name","surname","given_name","nationality","date_of_birth","gender","passport_expiry","flight_number","hotel_address","phone","email","purpose_of_visit"]', '{"passport_number":"여권번호","full_name":"성명","surname":"성","given_name":"이름","nationality":"국적","date_of_birth":"생년월일","gender":"성별","passport_expiry":"여권만료일","flight_number":"항공편명","hotel_address":"숙박지 주소","phone":"연락처","email":"이메일","purpose_of_visit":"방문목적"}', true),
('MY', 'Malaysia', 'Malaysia', 'https://imigresen-online.imi.gov.my/mdac/main', 'Malaysia Digital Arrival Card (MDAC)', '말레이시아 입국 3일 전 MDAC 작성이 필수입니다.', '["passport_number","full_name","surname","given_name","nationality","date_of_birth","gender","passport_expiry","flight_number","hotel_address","phone","purpose_of_visit"]', '{"passport_number":"여권번호","full_name":"성명","surname":"성","given_name":"이름","nationality":"국적","date_of_birth":"생년월일","gender":"성별","passport_expiry":"여권만료일","flight_number":"항공편명","hotel_address":"숙박지 주소","phone":"연락처","purpose_of_visit":"방문목적"}', true);
command:
